enabled.name: Enable Netrunner Cockpit
enabled.hint: Toggle this module's features on or off.

autoOpen.name: Auto-open on Your Turn
autoOpen.hint: Automatically open the cockpit when your netrunner's turn starts in combat.

alwaysShow.name: Always Show While Jacked In
alwaysShow.hint: Keep the cockpit window open whenever you are jacked in, not just on your turn.

allowNegative.name: Allow Negative NET Action Counter
allowNegative.hint: If disabled, ability buttons are blocked when the counter reaches zero.

actionCosts.name: Action Cost Table
actionCosts.hint: Configured per-ability via the module API or macro.

window.title: Netrunner Cockpit
window.rankTooltip: Per CPR corebook p. 197: Interface 1-3 = 2 actions, 4-6 = 3, 7-9 = 4, 10 = 5.

notifications.noCyberdeck: No equipped cyberdeck — equip a deck before rolling Interface abilities.
notifications.notJackedIn: Not jacked in — jack in from the character sheet or token HUD first.
notifications.outOfActions: No NET Actions remaining this turn.
notifications.noNetrunnerFound: No netrunner found — assign your character or select a netrunner token first.

toggleCockpit.name: Toggle Netrunner Cockpit
toggleCockpit.hint: Open the cockpit for your netrunner (jacks in automatically if needed). Press again to close. Defaults to Shift+J.

abilities.scannerDesc: Reveal all contents on the current floor.
abilities.cloakDesc: Hide from Black ICE and system traces.
abilities.controlDesc: Take control of a system element (camera, door, etc.).
abilities.eyedeeDesc: Identify an encrypted or hidden file.
abilities.pathfinderDesc: Reveal the map of the current floor.
abilities.slideDesc: Escape from a Black ICE attacker.
abilities.virusDesc: Corrupt a control node and erase its function.
abilities.zapDesc: Deliver an attack of last resort against Black ICE.
